mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT pf.workorder_id AS workorder_code, pf.item_id, ppl.batch_id, ppl.batch_code FROM mes_wm_production_issue_detail icl LEFT JOIN mes_wm_production_issue ic ON icl.issue_id = ic.id LEFT JOIN mes_pro_feedback pf ON pf.id = ic.feedback_id LEFT JOIN mes_wm_product_produce pp ON pp.work_order_id = ic.work_order_id LEFT JOIN mes_wm_product_produce_line ppl ON pp.id = ppl.produce_id WHERE icl.batch_code = #{batchCode}

SELECT DISTINCT ic.work_order_id AS workorder_code, icd.item_id, icd.batch_id, icd.batch_code FROM mes_wm_product_produce_detail ppd LEFT JOIN mes_wm_product_produce pp ON ppd.produce_id = pp.id LEFT JOIN mes_wm_production_issue ic ON pp.work_order_id = ic.work_order_id LEFT JOIN mes_wm_production_issue_detail icd ON ic.id = icd.issue_id WHERE ppd.batch_code = #{batchCode} AND icd.batch_code IS NOT NULL
